free_text: Low Energy Neutron Resonance Scattering and Absorption
Argonne heavy water reactor.
Converted to reaction formalism
BP: Updated to new date formats,lower
case. Corrections according last EXFOR rules and
Dict. Added sample information, subs. 37-65.
OS. Correction in sub.31
NaF.
Sample activities were either measured on
a Geiger counter or in a no-window air ionization
chamber.
Gold thermal capture cross section was taken to be 93b.
Table III, page 13.

4pi-annular proportional neutron counter
filled with enriched BF3 and surrounded by a paraffin
reflector-moderator and shield.
NaF.
An evacuated hole through the center of the counter
conducts a collimated beam of cadmium-filtered
neutrons from the Argonne water reactor. These
neutrons give rise to a counting rate only when a
scattering foil(termed the detector) is placed in the
of this tube transverse to the neutron beam.
Table IV, page 14.
